section: M&R Schedule A: Assets and Unearned Income
layout_note: Typed attachment table, transposed spreadsheet layout: one asset per column, attribute labels down the left (EIF; SP/DC/JT; Stock Name; Ticker; Transaction; Value of Asset A-L + Spouse/DC; Type of Income; Amount of Income A-K + Spouse/DC). Selections are black-filled cells. 4 asset columns, all SP. The Transaction row is one continuous black band across all four asset columns (no letter) - treated as divider/redaction, transaction null. Value of Asset row C ($1,001-$15,000) is a continuous black band across all four columns. Type of Income 'Capital Gains' is black across all four columns. Amount of Income: E ($2,501-$5,000) filled for INFO only; F ($5,001-$15,000) filled for FB, ILMN, ISRG (F band has a white gap at the INFO column).

uncertainties.read: entire Transaction row black-filled across all 4 columns
uncertainties.note: uniform black band with no P/S/E letter; likely formatting divider/redaction, recorded null for all four assets
